# GitHub Release Template

## Install Scripts

### Panel

Latest:
```bash
curl -L https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iKeilo/FLVXR2/main/panel_install.sh -o panel_install.sh && chmod +x panel_install.sh && ./panel_install.sh
```

Specific version:
```bash
curl -L https://github.com/iKeilo/FLVXR2/releases/download/3.0.13/panel_install.sh -o panel_install.sh && chmod +x panel_install.sh && ./panel_install.sh
```

### Node

Latest:
```bash
curl -L https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iKeilo/FLVXR2/main/install.sh -o install.sh && chmod +x install.sh && ./install.sh
```

Specific version:
```bash
curl -L https://github.com/iKeilo/FLVXR2/releases/download/3.0.13/install.sh -o install.sh && chmod +x install.sh && ./install.sh
```

## Default Account

- Username: `admin_user`
- Password: `admin_user`

Change the default password after the first login.

## Release Notes

Describe the user-visible changes for this release here.
